name: But If We Ever See Each Other Again... Will You Call Me Your Shipmate?!!

issues.description: Condition check is wrong. Effect requires 'your Leader is [Nefeltari Vivi]' but DSL uses HasCardOnBoard which checks for any card named 'Nefeltari Vivi' on the board, not specifically the Leader's name.
Extra spurious effect not present in official text. The second effect (Trigger with -2000 power to opponent character) does not appear anywhere in the official effectText and should not exist.
